final_answer: Re-ingested ./pdfs/bank_of_america_2024.pdf into the LanceDB table lancedb/nemo-retriever. The ingest CLI reported: 'Ingested 1 file(s) -> 470 row(s) in LanceDB lancedb/nemo-retriever.' Those 470 rows cover all 305 pages of the PDF and break down by extracted element type as 305 text chunks, 163 table chunks, and 2 chart chunks. The document is the Bank of America Corp /DE/ Form 10-K filed on the SEC EDGAR system on 2025-02-25 (accession number 0000070858-25-000139, CIK 0000070858); the PDF copy was generated on 2025-05-27. It is now searchable via retriever query.
